sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُوَظَّفُونَ مَعًا لِإِنْجَازِ الْمَشْرُوعِ فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُحَدَّدِ.
sentences.translation: Zaposlenici rade zajedno kako bi završili projekat na vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: The employees work together to complete the project on time.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ كُلُّ شَخْصٍ زَمِيلَهُ لِتَحْقِيقِ أَفْضَلِ النَّتَائِجِ.
sentences.translation: Svaka osoba pomaže svom kolegi da postignu najbolje rezultate.
sentences.translationEn: Every person helps their colleague to achieve the best results.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ هُوَ سِرُّ النَّجَاحِ فِي أَيِّ بِيئَةِ عَمَلٍ.
sentences.translation: Saradnja je tajna uspjeha u bilo kojem radnom okruženju.
sentences.translationEn: Cooperation is the secret of success in any work environment.
